MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Margaret De; Coto. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Marc Levinson and Defendant Nancy Guzan appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
